name: Wendy's Baked Potato Toppings
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Frozen chopped broccoli, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. BROCCOLI AND CHEESE: In the top of a double boiler, combine soup, Cheez Whiz, and minced onion, stirring until smooth. Stir broccoli into cheese sauce. Spoon over baked potatoes. Refrigerate leftover sauce to use within a week or freeze to use within 6 months.
2. CHILI AND CHEESE: Warm soup until piping hot. Spoon over baked potatoes and top with cheese.
3. SOUR CREAM AND CHIVES: Stir together Mayo, onion chip dip, and sour cream. Fold in minced chives and spoon over baked potatoes.
4. GROUND BEEF TOPPING: Brown beef in oil, crumbling the beef with a fork until all pink disappears. Add onion soup mix. Remove from heat and stir in paprika and sour cream. Spoon over baked potatoes.
